opinion.h4: VITORATOS v. WALSH, MUNICIPAL COURT CLERK. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 507, Misc. Decided November 19, 1962.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
La ROSE v. TAHASH, WARDEN. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MINNESOTA. No. 445, Misc. Decided November 19, 1962.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
